subject: [PATCH v5 12/18] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd (UFFD) system, which allows userspace to track read-write protection on memory ranges. It introduces two new UFFD ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, as well as a capability bit UFFD_FEATURE_RWP. The feature is not yet advertised in the UAPI, but will be exposed in a follow-up patch. The patch also includes changes to the kernel's configuration, documentation, and code to support this new feature.
